ValidationRule.description: Required fields when adding FTS owner that creates a billing onboarding for 1:1
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxt'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000000qsnN'), NOT(ISBLANK(FTS_Owner__c)), Declined_Billing_Training__c = FALSE, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) > DATE(2020,09,21), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Billing_Setup_Call_Path__c)), ISBLANK(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please complete 'Billing Setup Call Path' and 'Billing Call or Webinar Date' fields below
